timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Yalta Conference shapes postwar spheres
description: The wartime leaders met at Yalta to discuss postwar Europe, helping frame the political order that soon hardened into Cold War rivalry.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Germany surrenders in Europe
description: Nazi Germany's collapse removed the common enemy binding the United States and the Soviet Union and exposed deeper ideological conflict.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Atomic bombings transform superpower politics
description: The U.S. use of atomic bombs on Japan introduced nuclear weapons into international politics and intensified strategic rivalry.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Churchill delivers the Iron Curtain speech
description: Winston Churchill publicly described the division of Europe, giving a memorable phrase to the emerging East-West split.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Truman Doctrine is announced
description: President Harry Truman pledged support for countries resisting communism, marking formal U.S. containment policy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Marshall Plan is proposed
description: The United States launched a major recovery program for Europe, tying economic reconstruction to anti-communist strategy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Berlin Blockade begins
description: The Soviet Union cut land access to West Berlin, provoking a major crisis and the Western airlift response.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: NATO is founded
description: The North Atlantic Treaty Organization established a formal Western military alliance against Soviet power.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Soviet Union tests its first atomic bomb
description: The Soviet nuclear test ended the U.S. atomic monopoly and accelerated the arms race.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: People's Republic of China is proclaimed
description: The communist victory in China reshaped the global balance of power and widened the Cold War beyond Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Korean War begins
description: North Korea's invasion of South Korea turned the Cold War into a major hot war fought with superpower backing.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Stalin dies
description: Joseph Stalin's death opened a period of transition in Soviet leadership and later limited thaw.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Warsaw Pact is created
description: The Soviet Union and its allies formed a military bloc to counter NATO.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Hungarian Uprising is crushed
description: A revolt against Soviet domination was suppressed by force, showing the limits of Eastern bloc autonomy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Sputnik 1 is launched
description: The first artificial satellite shocked the United States and linked Cold War rivalry to the space race.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Berlin Wall construction begins
description: East Germany sealed the border in Berlin, creating the Cold War's most visible symbol of division.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Cuban Missile Crisis brings nuclear brinkmanship
description: The United States and the Soviet Union came to the edge of nuclear war over Soviet missiles in Cuba.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Prague Spring is crushed
description: Warsaw Pact forces invaded Czechoslovakia to end reform efforts, reinforcing Soviet control in Eastern Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: SALT I and the ABM Treaty are signed
description: The superpowers entered a major phase of détente and strategic arms control.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Soviet invasion of Afghanistan begins
description: The intervention reignited tensions and became a long, costly conflict for the Soviet Union.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Gorbachev comes to power
description: Mikhail Gorbachev's leadership introduced reforms that transformed Soviet policy and the late Cold War.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Berlin Wall falls
description: The opening of the wall became the defining symbol of the Cold War's collapse in Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, diplomatic, and symbolic turning points in the Cold War between the United States, the Soviet Union, and their allies.
title: Soviet Union is dissolved
description: The Soviet Union formally ended, bringing the Cold War to a close.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Sputnik 1 enters orbit
description: The Soviet Union launched the first artificial satellite, starting the Space Race in dramatic fashion.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Sputnik 2 carries Laika
description: The Soviet Union sent the dog Laika into orbit, demonstrating the feasibility of biological spaceflight.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Explorer 1 is launched
description: The United States orbited its first satellite and soon confirmed the Van Allen radiation belts.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: NASA begins operations
description: The United States created the National Aeronautics and Space Administration to lead civilian space exploration.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Luna 1 reaches the vicinity of the Moon
description: The Soviet probe became the first spacecraft to escape Earth's gravity and pass near the Moon.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Luna 2 impacts the Moon
description: Luna 2 became the first human-made object to reach the lunar surface.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Luna 3 photographs the Moon's far side
description: The Soviet mission returned the first images of the Moon's far side.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Yuri Gagarin orbits Earth
description: Vostok 1 made Gagarin the first human in space and the first to orbit Earth.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Alan Shepard flies on Freedom 7
description: Shepard became the first American in space on a suborbital Mercury mission.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Kennedy commits the United States to the Moon
description: President John F. Kennedy called for landing a man on the Moon before the decade's end.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: John Glenn becomes first American to orbit Earth
description: Mercury-Atlas 6 completed three Earth orbits and marked a major U.S. catch-up milestone.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Valentina Tereshkova flies into space
description: Tereshkova became the first woman in space aboard Vostok 6.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Alexei Leonov performs first spacewalk
description: Voskhod 2 achieved the first extravehicular activity in human history.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Gemini 6A and Gemini 7 rendezvous
description: NASA demonstrated orbital rendezvous, a key technique for Apollo.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Luna 9 makes first soft landing on the Moon
description: The Soviet Union achieved the first controlled soft landing on the lunar surface.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Surveyor 1 lands on the Moon
description: The United States made its first successful soft lunar landing.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Apollo 1 fire kills three astronauts
description: A cabin fire during a ground test forced NASA to redesign parts of the Apollo program.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Apollo 8 orbits the Moon
description: Apollo 8 became the first crewed mission to leave Earth orbit and circle the Moon.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Apollo 11 lands on the Moon
description: Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin completed the first crewed lunar landing, a defining Space Race victory for the United States.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Salyut 1 becomes first space station
description: The Soviet Union launched the world's first space station.

timeline_description: Key milestones in the competition between the Soviet Union and the United States to achieve major firsts in space exploration.
title: Apollo-Soyuz docking marks détente in space
description: An American Apollo spacecraft and a Soviet Soyuz spacecraft docked in orbit, symbolizing the end of the classic Space Race.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Red Turban Rebellion begins
description: A major anti-Yuan uprising helped create the conditions from which Zhu Yuanzhang would rise.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Zhu Yuanzhang captures Nanjing
description: The seizure of Nanjing gave Zhu a strong political and military base in the lower Yangtze.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Ming dynasty is proclaimed
description: Zhu Yuanzhang founded the Ming dynasty and became the Hongwu emperor.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Yuan rule collapses in Beijing
description: Ming forces took Dadu, ending Mongol rule over China proper.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Ming armies expand into the northwest
description: Early Ming campaigns consolidated control over territories formerly contested by Yuan forces.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Hongwu purges Chancellor Hu Weiyong
description: The purge eliminated the chief chancellorship and concentrated authority in the emperor.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Ming annexes Yunnan
description: The conquest of Yunnan extended Ming rule into southwestern China.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Hongwu emperor dies
description: The dynasty's founder died, triggering a succession crisis.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Yongle emperor seizes the throne
description: Zhu Di won the Jingnan civil war and took power as the Yongle emperor.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Zheng He's first voyage departs
description: The Ming court launched the first of the great treasure voyages across the Indian Ocean.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Forbidden City construction begins
description: The Yongle emperor began building the new imperial palace complex in Beijing.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Capital is formally moved to Beijing
description: The Ming court made Beijing the principal capital of the empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Yongle emperor dies
description: The death of Yongle ended one of the dynasty's most expansive reigns.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Zheng He's final voyage returns
description: The last of the great maritime expeditions marked the end of Ming blue-water expansion.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Tumu Crisis shakes the dynasty
description: Mongol forces captured the Zhengtong emperor, exposing military weaknesses.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Jingtai era begins imperial recovery
description: The court stabilized rule after the Tumu Crisis under a new emperor.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Portuguese gain a base at Macau
description: Macau became a durable point of European commercial presence under Ming rule.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Maritime trade restrictions are eased
description: The Longqing emperor's government relaxed the sea ban and expanded legal trade.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Wanli emperor begins his reign
description: Wanli's long reign would include both military success and later court paralysis.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Matteo Ricci enters China mission work
description: Jesuit activity expanded cultural and scientific exchange between China and Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Nurhaci founds Later Jin
description: The new Manchu state emerged as the gravest external threat to the late Ming.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Wanli emperor dies
description: The end of Wanli's reign left deep fiscal and political problems unresolved.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Nurhaci dies after gains against Ming
description: The Manchu challenge continued under Hong Taiji after Nurhaci's campaigns.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Beijing falls to Li Zicheng
description: Rebel forces seized the capital as the Ming court collapsed.

timeline_description: Major political, military, cultural, and economic events of China's Ming dynasty from its foundation to its fall.
title: Qing forces enter Beijing
description: With the Manchus' entry into Beijing, Ming rule in China proper effectively ended.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Upper and Lower Egypt are unified
description: The unification traditionally associated with Narmer or Menes created the early Egyptian state.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Old Kingdom begins
description: A centralized royal state emerged that later became famous for pyramid building.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Djoser commissions the Step Pyramid
description: The Step Pyramid at Saqqara marked a major innovation in monumental stone architecture.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Construction of the Great Pyramid begins
description: Khufu's pyramid at Giza became the largest and most iconic royal tomb of ancient Egypt.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Old Kingdom collapses
description: Central authority weakened, ushering in the First Intermediate Period.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Middle Kingdom is established
description: Mentuhotep II reunified Egypt and restored strong kingship.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Amenemhat I founds the Twelfth Dynasty order
description: The Twelfth Dynasty became one of the strongest phases of the Middle Kingdom.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Fortresses consolidate Egypt's Nubian frontier
description: Middle Kingdom rulers strengthened control to the south through fortification and administration.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Second Intermediate Period begins
description: The weakening of central power opened the way for Hyksos domination in the north.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Ahmose I reunifies Egypt
description: The expulsion of the Hyksos inaugurated the New Kingdom.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Hatshepsut becomes pharaoh
description: Hatshepsut's reign became notable for stability, building, and foreign trade expeditions.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Thutmose III expands Egyptian empire
description: Campaigns in the Levant made Egypt a leading imperial power in the eastern Mediterranean.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Akhenaten launches Atenist religious reforms
description: The king elevated the Aten and disrupted Egypt's traditional religious order.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Tutankhamun comes to the throne
description: His reign restored older cults after the Amarna experiment.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Ramesses II begins his reign
description: Ramesses II presided over one of the most celebrated and monument-rich reigns in Egyptian history.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Battle of Kadesh is fought
description: Egypt and the Hittites fought one of the best-documented battles of the ancient world.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Egypt-Hittite peace treaty is concluded
description: The agreement is among the earliest surviving international peace treaties.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: New Kingdom ends
description: Egypt entered the Third Intermediate Period after the decline of New Kingdom power.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Assyrians capture Memphis
description: Assyrian intervention showed Egypt's vulnerability to Near Eastern imperial powers.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Psamtik I begins Saite restoration
description: Native rule revived and attempted to restore Egyptian strength in the Late Period.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Persia conquers Egypt
description: Cambyses II defeated Egypt and incorporated it into the Achaemenid Empire.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Alexander the Great conquers Egypt
description: Macedonian conquest ended Persian rule and opened the Hellenistic era.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Ptolemy I founds the Ptolemaic kingdom
description: One of Alexander's generals established a Greek-ruled dynasty in Egypt.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, political, religious, and military turning points in the history of ancient Egypt from unification to Roman rule.
title: Rome annexes Egypt
description: After the defeat of Cleopatra VII and Mark Antony, Egypt became a Roman province.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Newcomen builds an early practical steam engine
description: Thomas Newcomen's atmospheric engine improved mine drainage and foreshadowed steam power's wider role.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Flying shuttle is introduced
description: John Kay's invention increased weaving speed and intensified pressure for faster spinning.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Spinning jenny appears
description: James Hargreaves's spinning jenny multiplied yarn output and accelerated textile mechanization.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Watt patents improvements to the steam engine
description: James Watt's separate condenser greatly improved efficiency and expanded industrial uses of steam.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Arkwright patents the water frame
description: The water frame made factory-scale spinning more practical and durable.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Arkwright opens Cromford Mill
description: Cromford became an important early model of the modern factory system.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Spinning mule is developed
description: Samuel Crompton combined features of earlier machines to improve fine yarn production.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Power loom is patented
description: Edmund Cartwright's power loom advanced the mechanization of weaving.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Iron production expands with coke smelting
description: New techniques in ironmaking supported machinery, transport, and construction.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Trevithick runs an early steam locomotive
description: High-pressure steam power demonstrated its potential for rail transport.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Luddite protests begin
description: Skilled workers attacked machinery they believed threatened wages, livelihoods, and workplace control.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Stockton and Darlington Railway opens
description: The line became the first public railway to use steam locomotives for passengers and freight.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Liverpool and Manchester Railway opens
description: The railway showed that fast, regular steam passenger service could be commercially successful.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Factory Act regulates child labor
description: Parliament imposed new restrictions on child labor in British textile mills.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Corn Laws are repealed
description: The repeal marked a major shift toward freer trade in industrial Britain.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Great Exhibition showcases industrial power
description: The Crystal Palace exhibition celebrated Britain's manufacturing achievements before a global audience.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Bessemer process is announced
description: Henry Bessemer's method made steel production faster and cheaper on a large scale.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Suez Canal opens
description: The canal shortened trade routes and strengthened the global industrial economy.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Second Industrial Revolution gathers pace
description: Steel, chemicals, electricity, and new corporate forms transformed late industrialization.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Edison's practical incandescent lamp appears
description: Electric lighting accelerated the expansion of electrified urban and industrial life.

timeline_description: Major inventions, economic shifts, and social turning points in the Industrial Revolution from its British origins to its global spread.
title: Ford perfects the moving assembly line
description: Mass production sharply reduced manufacturing time and changed industrial labor.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Early variolation is practiced in China
description: Early inoculation practices against smallpox appeared in China centuries before modern vaccination.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Variolation spreads in the Ottoman Empire
description: Smallpox inoculation was practiced in the Ottoman world and later drew European attention.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Variolation is introduced to Britain and Boston
description: Reports by Lady Mary Wortley Montagu and trials in Boston broadened Atlantic awareness of inoculation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Edward Jenner performs the first vaccine experiment
description: Jenner used cowpox material to protect against smallpox, inaugurating modern vaccination.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Jenner publishes his findings
description: Publication helped spread the new method of vaccination throughout Europe and beyond.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Vaccination reaches North America
description: Physicians in the United States began using Jennerian vaccination soon after its introduction.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Spanish Balmis Expedition begins
description: Spain organized a transatlantic mission to carry smallpox vaccination across its empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Pasteur demonstrates anthrax vaccination
description: Louis Pasteur publicly validated a laboratory-developed vaccine against anthrax.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Pasteur administers rabies vaccine
description: A successful rabies vaccination became a landmark in microbiology and preventive medicine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Diphtheria antitoxin transforms prevention and treatment
description: Antitoxin work laid foundations for later toxin-based vaccines and immunology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: BCG vaccine is first used in humans
description: The BCG vaccine became a key tool against tuberculosis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Diphtheria toxoid is developed
description: Toxoid technology enabled safer, standardized protection against diphtheria.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: First widely used pertussis vaccine appears
description: Early whooping cough vaccines expanded childhood immunization possibilities.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Yellow fever vaccine is developed
description: Max Theiler's work produced an effective yellow fever vaccine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Influenza vaccines are licensed in the United States
description: Licensed influenza vaccines brought routine vaccination into military and civilian health systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Salk polio vaccine is declared safe and effective
description: The announcement marked a decisive breakthrough against paralytic poliomyelitis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Oral polio vaccine spreads internationally
description: Sabin's oral vaccine enabled mass campaigns and easier administration.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: First measles vaccine is licensed
description: Vaccination sharply reduced one of the most common childhood viral diseases.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: WHO intensifies the global smallpox eradication program
description: A coordinated international campaign accelerated the elimination of smallpox.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: WHO launches the Expanded Programme on Immunization
description: The initiative broadened routine vaccine access worldwide.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Smallpox is declared eradicated
description: The World Health Organization certified the global eradication of smallpox.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: Hepatitis B vaccine enters wider use
description: The hepatitis B vaccine became a major advance against chronic viral disease and liver cancer risk.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: HPV vaccine is approved
description: The vaccine targeted strains linked to cervical cancer and other diseases.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Vaccination
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of vaccination from variolation to modern global immunization campaigns.
title: First COVID-19 vaccines receive emergency authorization
description: Rapid vaccine development during the pandemic reshaped public health and biotechnology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Mary Wollstonecraft publishes A Vindication of the Rights of Woman
description: The book became a foundational argument for women's political and educational rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Seneca Falls Convention meets
description: The convention's Declaration of Sentiments demanded women's civil and political equality, including suffrage.
location: Seneca Falls, New York, United States

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: National Woman Suffrage Association is founded
description: Elizabeth Cady Stanton and Susan B. Anthony helped organize a major American suffrage body.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Wyoming Territory grants women the vote
description: Wyoming became the first U.S. territory to enfranchise women.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: John Stuart Mill publishes The Subjection of Women
description: Mill's work gave influential philosophical support to women's equality and suffrage.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Susan B. Anthony votes illegally
description: Anthony's arrest and trial drew international attention to the denial of women's voting rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: New Zealand grants women national voting rights
description: New Zealand became the first self-governing country to enfranchise women nationally.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Australia enfranchises most women federally
description: The Commonwealth Franchise Act extended federal voting rights to most white women.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Women's Social and Political Union is founded
description: Emmeline Pankhurst and others launched a militant British suffrage organization.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Finland grants women full political rights
description: Women in Finland gained both the vote and the right to stand for parliament.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: International Women's Day gains momentum
description: The observance became a recurring platform for labor, political, and suffrage demands.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Great Suffrage Pilgrimage is held in Britain
description: Campaigners organized a mass nonviolent march to support women's voting rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Norway grants women full suffrage
description: Norway joined the early wave of countries extending full voting rights to women.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Women gain suffrage in Russia after revolution
description: Revolutionary upheaval accelerated political rights for women in Russia.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Britain enfranchises many women
description: The Representation of the People Act gave the vote to many British women over age 30.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Nineteenth Amendment is ratified in the United States
description: The amendment prohibited denying the vote on the basis of sex.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Britain grants equal voting terms
description: British women gained the vote on the same age terms as men.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Spain recognizes women's suffrage
description: The Second Spanish Republic adopted women's voting rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: France grants women the vote
description: French women gained national suffrage during the liberation era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Italy enfranchises women
description: Italian women voted in national elections after World War II.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: UN adopts the Convention on the Political Rights of Women
description: The treaty established an international standard for women's political rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Switzerland grants women federal suffrage
description: Swiss women finally obtained the vote in federal elections by referendum.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Women's Suffrage Movement
timeline_description: Major international milestones in the long struggle to secure voting rights for women.
title: Saudi women vote in municipal elections
description: Women in Saudi Arabia participated in voting and candidacy at the municipal level for the first time.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Augustus establishes the principate
description: Octavian took the title Augustus and created the imperial system that followed the Roman Republic.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Tiberius succeeds Augustus
description: The first dynastic succession tested the stability of the new imperial order.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Claudius invades Britain
description: Rome began the conquest of much of Britain under Emperor Claudius.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Great Fire devastates Rome
description: A major fire transformed the city and became a defining event of Nero's reign.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Nero dies
description: The Julio-Claudian dynasty ended, plunging the empire into civil war.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Year of the Four Emperors
description: Rapid changes of ruler ended with Vespasian's victory and the Flavian dynasty.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Vesuvius erupts
description: The eruption buried Pompeii and Herculaneum, preserving extraordinary evidence of Roman life.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Nerva begins the adoptive emperors era
description: Nerva's accession led into a period often seen as one of stable imperial government.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Trajan annexes Dacia
description: Rome reached one of its greatest territorial expansions under Trajan.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Hadrian succeeds Trajan
description: Hadrian consolidated imperial frontiers rather than pressing further expansion.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Construction of Hadrian's Wall begins
description: The wall became a major frontier monument in Roman Britain.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Caracalla issues the Constitutio Antoniniana
description: Roman citizenship was extended to nearly all free inhabitants of the empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Crisis of the Third Century begins
description: Military upheaval, usurpation, invasion, and economic strain destabilized the empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Diocletian becomes emperor
description: Diocletian began far-reaching military and administrative reforms.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Tetrarchy is established
description: Diocletian divided imperial rule among four emperors to improve defense and governance.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Edict of Milan legalizes Christianity
description: Constantine and Licinius granted toleration to Christians across the empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Constantine becomes sole ruler
description: Constantine defeated Licinius and reunified imperial authority under one emperor.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Constantinople is dedicated
description: The new capital on the Bosporus reshaped the empire's political center of gravity.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Romans are defeated at Adrianople
description: The defeat by Gothic forces exposed serious military weaknesses.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Christianity becomes the state religion
description: Theodosius I made Nicene Christianity the empire's official religion.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Empire is permanently divided
description: After Theodosius I, eastern and western imperial courts developed separately.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Visigoths sack Rome
description: The sack shocked the Roman world and became a symbol of western decline.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Vandals sack Rome
description: A second major sack deepened the crisis of the Western Roman Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, religious, and administrative turning points in the history of the Roman Empire.
title: Romulus Augustulus is deposed
description: The deposition of the last western emperor became the conventional end date of the Western Roman Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Woodblock printing develops in China
description: Woodblock techniques enabled early large-scale reproduction of texts and images in East Asia.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Diamond Sutra is printed
description: The Diamond Sutra is the oldest complete dated printed book known to survive.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Bi Sheng develops movable type
description: Bi Sheng's ceramic movable type was an early breakthrough in printing technology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Metal movable type is used in Korea
description: Korean printers developed metal movable type centuries before European mechanized printing.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Jikji is printed
description: Jikji is the oldest known surviving book printed with movable metal type.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Gutenberg perfects mechanized movable-type printing
description: Johannes Gutenberg combined movable type, oil-based ink, and the press into a transformative system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Gutenberg Bible is completed
description: The Gutenberg Bible became the iconic early masterpiece of European printing.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Printing reaches Italy
description: Italian presses quickly became central to Renaissance humanist publishing.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Printing spreads to Paris
description: The rapid spread of presses helped turn Paris into a major European publishing center.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Caxton sets up a press in England
description: William Caxton introduced printing to England and shaped early English print culture.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Aldine Press popularizes portable books
description: Aldus Manutius expanded the market for smaller printed books and humanist texts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Luther's theses circulate in print
description: Print accelerated the spread of Reformation ideas across Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Act of Supremacy fuels English print controversy
description: Print became central to religious and political debate in Tudor England.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Relation, an early newspaper, appears
description: Printed periodical news entered a new stage with one of the first newspapers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: La Gazette begins publication
description: One of Europe's first influential newspapers marked growing state-linked print culture.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Publick Occurrences is printed in Boston
description: The short-lived paper was the first multicolumn newspaper issued in British North America.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: The Times adopts steam-powered printing
description: Industrial printing technologies vastly increased speed and circulation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Rotary press is patented
description: Richard March Hoe's rotary press transformed mass newspaper production.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Linotype machine is invented
description: Ottmar Mergenthaler's Linotype revolutionized typesetting for newspapers and books.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: Penguin Books popularizes the modern paperback
description: Cheap paperbacks dramatically widened access to printed literature.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Printing Press and Print Culture
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of printing technology and the spread of print culture from East Asia to the modern mass media era.
title: The Mosaic browser helps launch digital publishing era
description: Digital distribution began reshaping print culture by moving reading and publishing online.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Dutch tulip market collapses
description: The bursting of speculative tulip prices became an enduring symbol of financial mania.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: South Sea Bubble bursts
description: A dramatic collapse in share prices shook British finance and public confidence.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Credit crisis hits London and Europe
description: The failure of key banking houses triggered a broader eighteenth-century credit panic.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Panic of 1792 strikes the young United States
description: A securities crisis tested the stability of the early American financial system.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: First major U.S. depression begins
description: A postwar credit contraction produced widespread bank failures and foreclosures.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Panic of 1857 spreads internationally
description: A banking and trade shock rippled through the United States and Europe.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Long Depression begins
description: A major financial crash in Europe and North America triggered a prolonged downturn.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Baring Crisis threatens London finance
description: The near-failure of Baring Brothers exposed global vulnerabilities tied to sovereign debt.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Panic of 1907 convulses U.S. banking
description: The crisis strengthened arguments for creating a central bank in the United States.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Wall Street crash begins Great Depression era
description: The U.S. stock market crash became the most famous symbol of the global depression that followed.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: European banking crisis intensifies
description: Bank failures and the collapse of the gold standard deepened the interwar crisis.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Bretton Woods system is created
description: Postwar leaders designed a new international monetary framework to reduce instability.
location: Bretton Woods, New Hampshire, United States

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Oil shock destabilizes the global economy
description: The OPEC oil embargo triggered recession, inflation, and financial strain across many countries.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Latin American debt crisis erupts
description: Mexico's announcement of debt-payment difficulties exposed a wider sovereign debt crisis.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Black Monday crashes global equity markets
description: A record one-day fall in stock prices spread across financial centers worldwide.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Mexican peso crisis begins
description: Currency collapse in Mexico sparked contagion across emerging markets.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Asian financial crisis begins
description: Thailand's currency devaluation triggered a wider regional financial meltdown.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Russian default and LTCM crisis rattle markets
description: Sovereign default and hedge-fund instability prompted major international intervention.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Argentina enters severe financial collapse
description: Debt default and banking restrictions produced one of the country's worst crises.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Global financial crisis begins
description: Stress in U.S. mortgage markets spread through banks and financial institutions worldwide.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy
description: Lehman's collapse became the defining shock of the 2008 global financial panic.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Great Recession grips the world economy
description: Financial turmoil fed a synchronized global downturn in output, trade, and employment.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Eurozone sovereign debt crisis escalates
description: Fiscal stress in Greece and other countries threatened the stability of the euro area.

timeline_description: Major banking, debt, and market crises that reshaped national economies and the global financial system.
title: Pandemic market crash jolts global finance
description: The COVID-19 shock caused a sudden global sell-off followed by extraordinary central-bank intervention.
